calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:45am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk Jean Kong, D525, Not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Stephen R. Jaffe Esq., appears in pro per; Respondent, Mark Kimmel PHD, appears in pro per with witness Destin Couier. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.
Respondent, Kimmel examines Mr. Couier.

EXHR (A) 3/9 E-Mail, etc.

10:20am
Matter is submitted. Newly Marked Evidence is retained.
